channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: James Comer to Newsmax: Walz, Ellison 'Turned Blind Eye' to Alleged Minn. Fraud
item.description: Minnesota Democrat Gov. Tim Walz and state Attorney General Keith Ellison turned "a blind eye" to alleged fraud and "retaliated" against whistleblower...

item.title: It's Official: Winner Declared in Texas Democrat Senate Primary
CCP-Linked Activist Network Targets Palantir As Beijing’s Influence Machine Hits U.S. Soil
Rep. Miller-Meeks to Newsmax: Trump Has Authority to Stop Iran Nukes
item.description: President Donald Trump has the authority to take military action to prevent Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon, Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks said W...

item.title: US 'winning decisively' against Iran, will achieve 'complete control' of airspace within days, Hegseth says
item.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth says America is winning decisively against Iran, predicting the US will achieve complete control of Iranian airspace.

item.title: Via Iran and Venezuela, Trump Makes the Cold War Great Again
Gun rights expert says Minnesota Dems tried to block her testimony on firearm bills to 'avoid' policy debate
item.description: Second Amendment advocate Amy Swearer says Minnesota Democrats limited her testimony on gun control bills, focusing on emotion over policy expertise.

item.title: Bessent: 15 Percent Global Tariff Starts This Week
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Wednesday that an increase in President Donald Trump's new temporary global import tariff to 15% from 10% was...

item.title: Dan Crenshaw Suffers Stunning Upset in Texas GOP Primary: ‘Enjoy Unemployment’
House Committee Calls Bill Gates, Leon Black for Epstein Probe
item.description: House Oversight and Government Reform Chairman James Comer, R-Ky., is seeking transcribed, in-person interviews this spring with Microsoft founder Bil...

item.title: Texas GOP Rep Wesley Hunt vows political comeback, does not yet endorse Cornyn or Paxton
item.description: Rep. Wesley Hunt vowed a comeback after finishing third in Texas Senate Republican primary behind John Cornyn and Ken Paxton on Tuesday.

item.title: US submarine sinks Iranian warship by torpedo in a first since World War II
Former MLB star Mark Teixeira wins GOP primary in Texas congressional race
item.description: Mark Teixeira secured the GOP nomination in Texas’ 21st District after winning more than 50% of the vote, avoiding a runoff in the crowded Republican ...

item.title: Video Emerges of UCSF Administrator Threatening to Kill Critic of Child Trans Surgeries
Senate to Vote on Iran War Powers Resolution
item.description: Lawmakers in the U.S. Senate were set to begin voting on Wednesday on a bipartisan war powers resolution aiming to stop the military campaign against ...
